request_payload.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local paper - our town's emergency response drill last month was a total mess. Volunteers showed up but had no idea what to do because the new 'preparedness' app was glitching. Meanwhile, officials were more worried about checking boxes than actual readiness. How is this supposed to make us safer? #CivilDefense #NationalSecurity
